training_status: active gym-goer, returned to gym 2 days post-surgery for legs/core/cardio
health_conditions: full rupture of distal bicep tendon

compounds.frequency: split into 75mg twice weekly (Sunday and Thursday)

benefits.description: 4-6 weeks ahead of PT recovery schedule after distal bicep tendon rupture surgery; sling and cast removed in 8 days; full supination and pronation with little discomfort shortly after; progressing rapidly through PT milestones
Minimal discomfort and near non-existent pain throughout recovery; did not experience expected level of swelling

protocol_notes: Surgery June 17th, protocol started same night. All injections in the stomach/abdomen. Also taking 5g citrulline malate twice daily, 5g creatine monohydrate twice daily, 25g collagen peptides once daily. Previous experience using BPC/TB for knee pain via stomach injections. Returned to gym 2 days post-surgery for lower body, core, and cardio only. Surgeon approved early cast removal and encouraged movement.
